title: StudioDash Guide
description: A compact StudioDash guide linking the main product, integration, analytics, reporting, sync, security, and FAQ pages.
summary: Use this guide as a quick route through the main StudioDash documentation pages.

sections.heading: Start here
paragraphs: Start with the [StudioDash overview](/apps/studiodash), then review the features and integrations pages to understand the product direction and provider coverage.
StudioDash is currently in development, so public documentation separates implemented coverage from placeholders and roadmap items.

sections.heading: Analytics path
paragraphs: For product and business metrics, review Revenue Analytics, App Store Analytics, and Website & SEO Analytics. Together, these pages explain how StudioDash is designed to bring app, revenue, advertising, website, and search visibility signals into one workspace.

sections.heading: Operations path
paragraphs: For day-to-day operation, review Dashboard, Reporting, Automation & Sync, and Security & Privacy. These pages cover the dashboard workspace, reporting direction, provider status language, and public security principles.
